title: Retailers are rushing to build AI apps. It’s unclear if shoppers will use them
description: There are almost 900 apps on ChatGPT and 353 Claude connectors, according to AppDiscoverability.com, which tracks AI app data.

title: UrbanStems CEO Meenakshi Lala fills her cart with handbags, Quince basics and unexpected florals
description: In the latest installment of "What's in Your Cart," the CEO of UrbanStems, Meenakshi Lala, shares her personal shopping habits with Modern Retail.

title: How Ace Hardware built its employee AI assistant
description: Ace Hardware is a unique retailer, being a cooperative with more than 5,200 stores that are operated independently. As a result, its executives and development team took a careful approach in designing and implementing its new AI assistant to work throughout the chain.

title: GameStop’s $56B eBay bid aims to create collectibles powerhouse
description: The gaming retailer submitted an unsolicited acquisition proposal for the online marketplace and suggested its store fleet could serve as eBay's fulfillment network.

title: Saks Global expects to exit bankruptcy in June with $1.2B in debt
description: The luxury retail conglomerate said it would be profitable in three years and that, starting next fiscal year, revenue growth would average 7% annually.

title: Target launches new kind of supply chain facility
description: The Houston Receive Center gives the retailer more inventory-holding capacity before sending products to downstream locations.

title: Chrome Extensions for GenAI Visibility
description:
Testing and experimenting reveal priorities for elevating visibility in genAI platforms. 
The post Chrome Extensions for GenAI Visibility appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: GameStop proposes acquisition of eBay without clarifying funding
description:
GameStop has submitted a proposal to acquire all of the online marketplace eBay, which made about as much in sales during its most recent fiscal quarter as the retail chain did in its most recent full fiscal year. The proposal would have GameStop acquire eBay for about $55.5 billion, following customary closing conditions. It is […]
The post GameStop proposes acquisition of eBay without clarifying funding appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Our Vision for Building an Open Ecosystem for the Agent Era
description: For years, HubSpot invested in making our platform the best place for marketing, sales, and service teams to do their work. With AI, we’ve been building it to do the work for them – through agents that qualify leads, resolve tickets, save deals, and drive outcomes across the business. That’s why we call HubSpot an agentic customer platform.

title: Dollar General bridges onsite, offsite retail media with new solution
description: Brands will be able to activate and optimize offsite and onsite inventory within The Trade Desk for the first time through an integration supported by Kevel.

title: Inside Opal’s attempt to reduce AI’s ‘alignment tax’ for marketers
description: The planning platform's new AI copilot, Gem, is designed to align campaign data with overall strategy and help teams understand results faster.

title: DoorDash delivers memes, reality TV moms for Mother’s Day campaign
description: A hero spot and social content spotlight the mom group chat as part of an effort that includes deals with Ulta, Old Navy and more.

title: Omnicom credits Q1 wins to core operations, reaffirms ongoing cost cuts
description: The company also touted the success of its AI-powered Omni marketing platform, which has now been scaled across the entire organization.

title: How Qualcomm is building an iconic consumer brand for the AI era
description: CMO Don McGuire details the tech giant’s work to develop consumer brand Snapdragon, which culminates in a new campaign by 72andSunny.

title: DoorDash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.
